description_full:
📍 Remote - Greece or Belgium | 🕐 Posted 2 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 Blockchain/EVM | 🔗 Ethereum, Hyperledger Besu, Corda, Cosmos, Solidity, PKI, Kubernetes, AWS/Azure/GCP

The company is looking for Shared Ledger Engineers to join a major US-based project in the financial sector. MindWave is a Greece-and Belgium based Blockchain expert providing long-term collaboration opportunities.

🌍 International team & cutting-edge technology.

Tech stack includes: Ethereum, Hyperledger Besu, Corda, Cosmos, Solidity, PKI, Kubernetes, AWS/Azure/GCP.

📩 To apply: Send a message or your CV to Joy Sergeys via joy.sergeys@mindwave.com or DM Joy Sergeys on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joysergeys
